atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports intermittent eye twitching

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the eye twitching as occurring several times an hour

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient notes that the twitch does not cause pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient occasionally feels an urge to blink

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that the twitch has been present for approximately six weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any history of seizures

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any history of neurological disorders

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's father appears nervous when the twitch occurs

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that he sometimes experiences urges to move his face

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient occasionally feels a sensation of movement in his face during the twitch

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any fever, chills, or cough

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any sleep problems

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that he has been eating and playing normally

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that he has been playing soccer

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician diagnoses a transient eye twitch.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports no evidence of seizures or other neurological disorders.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports intact cranial nerves.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports symmetric reflexes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports no pronator drift.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports normal neurological exam findings.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's height is 4'11.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to schedule a follow-up appointment in one month.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician denies recommending any medication or topical treatment.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient and his father to monitor the twitch.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient and his father to avoid drawing attention to it.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient and his father to ignore the twitch and not to exacerbate it.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a referral to a pediatric ophthalmologist if the twitch persists or worsens.
